{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320154903377040A2176EBC9B9053"}"},"total":9},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7562641878085272382","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容丰富，写的不错，值得看[爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760821114,"group_id":"7451531575663004697","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0IFdohZd4D078/9FMYmVwY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d28e25efae294a6d8b9c7f88991095e1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531960&x-signature=%2FXhwjnQ6srZFSZvqbOKM%2FwNl6Ds%3D","user_id":"108029223494","user_name":"人生如梦，往事如烟。"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108029223494","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7451531575663004697","book_info":{"abstract":"“丹田既毁，道途当绝？”
少年王炎为修炼上古禁忌仙法《九品金仙诀》，自毁丹田，沦为废人，受尽族人嘲讽，连少主之位也被剥夺。  
“今日笑我如蝼蚁，他日尔等尽低眉！”
三月沉寂，一朝爆发！家族大比之上，王炎以无敌之姿横扫天骄，登临绝巅。那些曾讥讽他的人，此刻才明白——他们嘲笑的，究竟是怎样一尊真龙！  
这是一个诸仙为食、天道为囚的绝望时代！
九大仙尊执掌寰宇，视万界修士如血食。王炎逆天崛起，以凡躯战仙，以一剑绝仙！  
“既然仙道不仁，那我便做那——绝仙武帝！”
【传统玄幻】【天才崛起】【剑道至尊】【单女主】【杀伐果断】【高燃复仇】【扮猪吃虎】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o88245d60a1fd6d76b0db0582cbeb24db~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"白龙城主","author_id":"","book_id":"7451531575663004697","book_name":"绝仙武帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203060","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":868,"name":"剑修","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=868&name=剑修&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7459785109957263896","read_count":"387","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"601745"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"261","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,天才,扮猪吃虎,单女主,剑修","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2of67910bf5386d57a6ded8cfc869c0c3f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779176943&x-signature=DfVxrcXUkG2xn2%2BDhHnvrdsxnoE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4265754955625192","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"12"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320154903377040A2176EBC9B9053"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读60分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg
